title: Today I became the 1 in Eight. I knew my diagnosis. I just had a strong sense.
body: I have so much to process right now. My Specialist sat with my husband and me for 2hours giving incredibly detailed and encouraging information. I’m between stage 1 & 2. IDCIS & IDC. Next step is an MRI for Deeper look. My doc told me the #1 exacerbating component is stress, and it makes sense. The past 3 years teaching have been horrible. If I could retire now I would. I’m so glad this community exists!
